---
title: "analyze_power"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r}
p12 <- read.csv("~/Downloads/power_out_1p2.csv")
p13 <- read.csv("~/Downloads/power_out_1p3.csv")
p14 <- read.csv("~/Downloads/power_out_1p4.csv")

power_all <- rbind(p12, p13, p14)

power_all
```

```{r}
cols <- c("blue","red","darkgreen")

plot(power_all$t_eval, power_all$power,
     type="n", ylim=c(0,1),
     xlab="Evaluation time (tau)",
     ylab="Power")

i <- 1
for(e in unique(power_all$effect_label)){
  lines(power_all$t_eval[power_all$effect_label==e],
        power_all$power[power_all$effect_label==e],
        type="b", col=cols[i], lwd=2, pch=16)
  i <- i+1
}

legend("bottomright",
       legend=c("HR = 1.2","HR = 1.3","HR = 1.4"),
       col=cols, lty=1, lwd=2, pch=16)
```
